# This test exercises MMA behavior at low write bandwidth with the
# significance floor. With 500 ranges across 6 nodes under a write-only
# workload, mean WB per store is ~2.5 MB/s, below the 5 MiB/s significance
# floor. The skewed initial placement creates large enough imbalances that
# the most loaded stores exceed the 10% overloadSlow threshold (relative to
# the 5 MiB floor), triggering WB-based rebalancing.
#
# MMA sheds replicas from overloaded stores until fractionAbove drops below
# the threshold. Because the floor is larger than the mean, the residual
# imbalance at convergence is wider than it would be without the floor:
# stores settle within ~524 KB/s of the mean (10% of 5 MiB) rather than
# within 10% of the mean itself. This is the intended tradeoff -- the floor
# prevents churn from tiny absolute differences at the cost of looser
# balancing at low throughput.
#
# See: https://github.com/cockroachdb/cockroach/issues/164539
#
# Setup:
#   - 6 nodes, 500 ranges with skewed initial placement
#   - Write-only uniform workload, mean WB ≈ 2.5 MB/s per store
#   - Per-range WB ≈ 10 KB/s
gen_cluster nodes=6 node_cpu_cores=8
----

gen_ranges ranges=500 placement_type=skewed
----

gen_load rate=5000 rw_ratio=0 min_block=1000 max_block=1000 raft_cpu_per_write=1
----
0.00 raft-vcpus, 4.8 MiB/s goodput

setting split_queue_enabled=false
----

eval duration=25m cfgs=(mma-only,mma-count) metrics=(write_bytes_per_second,replicas,cpu)
----
mma-only:
cpu#1: last:  [s1=3006, s2=2926, s3=2818, s4=2639, s5=2012, s6=1588] (stddev=520.87, mean=2498.17, sum=14989)
cpu#1: thrash_pct: [s1=8%, s2=8%, s3=17%, s4=9%, s5=11%, s6=11%]  (sum=65%)
replicas#1: first: [s1=500, s2=433, s3=243, s4=148, s5=100, s6=76] (stddev=162.90, mean=250.00, sum=1500)
replicas#1: last:  [s1=301, s2=293, s3=282, s4=264, s5=201, s6=159] (stddev=52.20, mean=250.00, sum=1500)
replicas#1: thrash_pct: [s1=0%, s2=0%, s3=0%, s4=0%, s5=0%, s6=0%]  (sum=0%)
write_bytes_per_second#1: last:  [s1=3006427, s2=2926206, s3=2818300, s4=2639529, s5=2012206, s6=1588983] (stddev=520702.48, mean=2498608.50, sum=14991651)
write_bytes_per_second#1: thrash_pct: [s1=7%, s2=7%, s3=17%, s4=9%, s5=11%, s6=11%]  (sum=62%)
hash: 93291ac58e6a83ab
==========================

replicas#1: last:  [s1=261, s2=260, s3=260, s4=239, s5=241, s6=239] (stddev=10.36, mean=250.00, sum=1500)

hash: 92af9bb72856a4fc
==========================
